name: Apple-Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onion in butter until tender. Remove from the heat.
2. Add bread, apples, celery, parsley, and 1/4 teaspoon salt to the skillet. Mix well.
3. Cut a large pocket in the side of each pork chop. Sprinkle inside and outside with pepper and remaining salt.
4. Loosely stuff the pockets with the mixture.
5. In a large skillet, brown the chops on both sides in oil. Place in an ungreased large baking pan.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Uncover and bake for another 30 minutes or until meat juices run very clear.
7. Make gravy from pan juices if desired.
